form.formComment: Resuming after five-and-a-half months off the scene. Finished off last preparation when well beaten into twelfth behind Freeze Frame at Ashburton Raceway over 1700m in a 2yo CG on October 27 at $16.60. Previous preparation first-up won by 2.25 m (Fr8) at Alexandra Park (2:03.80) beating Utah Blaze in 2yo on August 22 at $5. Unbeaten fresh so keep safe from the ace draw.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 5th (Fr7) over 2200m at Alexandra Park beaten 4.5 m by Jumal (2:43.40) in 3yo CG on March 20 at $93.40. Showed ability the race before when he won by 8 m (Fr6) at Alexandra Park (2:41.60) beating Miss Cherokee in 3yo+ on March 6 at $2.90. Nicely drawn and can threaten from there.
